name: warpweb
description: Research, build, and deploy AI-generated websites via the Warpweb API.
long_description:
Official MCP server for the Warpweb API. Research, build, and deploy AI-generated websites from any MCP-compatible client.

One POST kicks off research, build, and deploy: Warpweb pulls Google Places data (hours, photos, reviews, service area), writes vertical-matched copy, generates a design, builds a multi-page site, adds SEO (meta tags, sitemap, Schema.org JSON-LD), and deploys to a free `*.warpweb.app` subdomain. Best for service-based local businesses (trades, clinics, salons, agencies, restaurants, real estate).

Tools exposed (10): `search_businesses`, `create_site`, `get_site`, `list_sites`, `refresh_site`, `create_revision`, `check_domain`, `register_domain`, `attach_domain`, `configure_form_webhook`.

Get an API key at https://warpweb.ai/app — 520 free credits on signup, no card required.

tools.name: search_businesses
tools.description: Disambiguate a business name against Google Places before building. Returns up to 5 candidates with placeId, address, phone, and rating.

tools.name: create_site
tools.description: Kick off an end-to-end website build (research, copy, design, deploy). Returns siteId immediately; real builds take 3-8 minutes.

tools.name: get_site
tools.description: Fetch one site's current status. Use to poll a build (every 2-5 seconds) while status is `generating`.

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List every site on the account.

tools.name: refresh_site
tools.description: Bump the inactivity timer on a free-subdomain site (auto-pauses after 7 days). Idempotent and free.

tools.name: create_revision
tools.description: Conversational edit of a deployed site. Send a plain-English prompt; Warpweb routes small surgical edits or full structural changes automatically.

tools.name: check_domain
tools.description: Check availability and price for a candidate domain. Free, returns a few related suggestions.

tools.name: register_domain
tools.description: Buy a domain via Cloudflare Registrar and attach it to a site. Must call `check_domain` first.

tools.name: attach_domain
tools.description: Attach a customer-owned domain already registered elsewhere. Returns the CNAME target to set at their existing registrar.

tools.name: configure_form_webhook
tools.description: Point form submissions on a site at your HTTP(S) endpoint. Each delivery is HMAC-SHA256 signed; the signing secret is returned once on first configure or rotate.

warpweb_api_key.title: Warpweb API Key
warpweb_api_key.description: Format: wwk_... (get one at warpweb.ai/app — 520 free credits, no card)
